headline: Exploring 3 Undervalued Asian Small Caps With Insider Activity
summary: As global markets navigate the complexities of Middle East tensions and energy market volatility, Asian small-cap stocks present unique opportunities amidst these broader economic shifts. In this environment, identifying stocks with strong fundamentals and insider activity can offer insights into potential value plays within the dynamic Asian markets.

headline: A new valve, a new playbook: How Anteris is trying to reshape a $10B heart market
summary: Cardiovascular disease may be one of medicine’s oldest battlegrounds, but some of its most important technologies are still evolving — and not always as quickly as patients, and investors, might expect.
